_comment: Canonical Open-Meteo Air Quality response baseline. Carries every field the adapter parses (current AQI + pollutants, hourly per-taxon pollen counts). The snapshot test in fixture-snapshots.test.ts re-parses this on every PR; if Open-Meteo changes the response shape, the build fails loudly rather than letting the adapter degrade silently to defaults. Source: a real /v1/air-quality call with timezone=auto, sanitised for stability. Refresh against the live API with: curl 'https://air-quality-api.open-meteo.com/v1/air-quality?latitude=60.17&longitude=24.94&current=european_aqi,pm10,pm2_5,nitrogen_dioxide,sulphur_dioxide,ozone,carbon_monoxide&hourly=alder_pollen,birch_pollen,grass_pollen,mugwort_pollen,olive_pollen,ragweed_pollen&timezone=auto'
